title: 📘 قواعد الوحدة 12: Verb + Infinitive / Verb + Object + Infinitive / Gerunds / Past Perfect

topics.name: 1. الأفعال التي تتبعها to + infinitive
topics.rule: هناك أفعال مثل: afford, choose, decide, expect, forget, hope, learn, manage, offer, promise, refuse, remember, try. تأتي بعدها to + المصدر.
examples: Don't forget to lock the door.

topics.name: 2. الأفعال التي تتبعها كائن (pronoun/noun) + to + infinitive
topics.rule: بعض الأفعال تسمح بوضع مفعول به (me, him, us...) ثم to + مصدر: allow, expect, need, want, ask, etc.
examples: He allowed me to use his computer.
They expect him to arrive early.
She asked me to help her.

topics.name: 3. الأفعال التي تتبعها gerund (V-ing)
topics.rule: أفعال مثل: avoid, enjoy, suggest, finish, mind. تأتي بعدها V-ing (gerund).
examples: Sam suggested meeting at the station.

topics.name: 4. Gerund كفاعل للجملة
topics.rule: نستخدم الفعل + ing كفاعل للجملة (موضوع الجملة).

topics.name: 5. Past Perfect Tense (الماضي التام)
topics.rule: نستخدم past perfect (had + past participle) للتعبير عن حدث وقع قبل حدث آخر في الماضي. نستخدمه مع after, before, by the time, already.
examples: I had written the article before he came.
After she had gone to the hotel, she exchanged money.
The film had started before I ate dinner.

topics.name: 6. It's + adjective + to + verb ( للتعبير عن النصيحة)
topics.rule: نستخدم It's + صفة + to + مصدر لإعطاء نصيحة أو حكم.
examples: It's polite to let a person finish speaking.
It's a good idea to write a thank-you note.

common_mistakes: ❌ She avoided to tell him. → ✅ She avoided telling him.
❌ I suggested to go. → ✅ I suggested going.
❌ He decided going. → ✅ He decided to go.
❌ I expect he comes. → ✅ I expect him to come.
❌ I had wrote the letter. → ✅ I had written the letter.
